opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I got into a huge shouting match, felt my heart race incredibly fast, and the next thing I knew I was waking up on the floor.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Fainted during an intense argument after a burst of very fast heartbeats, then woke up on the floor - the family wants it checked urgently.

symptom_narrative.onset: suddenly, during a heated emotional argument
symptom_narrative.duration: the blackout lasted under a minute with quick, complete recovery
symptom_narrative.character: a sudden burst of very fast, pounding heartbeats and then a total blackout with no warning
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: completely passed out and woke up on the floor, frightening for everyone
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: felt the racing in the chest, then lost consciousness
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on right at the peak of an emotional argument; has also felt dizzy and light-headed during competitive sports over the past year
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: resting and calming down; recovered fully and quickly on its own
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: intense emotion and physical exertion/sport seem to bring on the racing and dizziness
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: rapid palpitations just before fainting; denies chest pain, breathlessness, or confusion afterwards
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: episodes of severe dizziness and light-headedness during competitive sport over the past year, but no previous full blackout
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: currently fully mobile and calm but anxious; frightened to exert or get upset in case it happens again

family_history_as_reported.narrative: a cousin on my mum's side died suddenly playing basketball when he was 16

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: family frightened by the collapse and the cousin's death; want reassurance but also to know if this is dangerous

communication_style.typical_message_style: patient answers with a parent adding detail and expressing worry
